items.name: Tau symbol
items.description: If you play Warhammer 40k, you will most likely know this symbol. If not, it is the symbol of the        T'au sept of the Tau alien race (confusing, huh?) in the sci-fi tabletop strategy game played using buildable plastic and metal miniatures, Warhammer 40k.
